decisions.choice: Filter unanswered questions, sort by priority, apply gap-based limits
decisions.reason: Directly implements the acceptance criteria: small gap (1-2 questions), medium gap (3-5 questions), large gap (all questions)

decisions.choice: Simple bubble sort with priority value mapping
decisions.reason: Sufficient for small lists of questions, straightforward to understand and verify

decisions.choice: First check for direct context match, fallback to any gathered context
decisions.reason: Ensures Context field is populated when gathered context exists, even if not directly mapped to question ID

decisions.choice: Small: min(2, totalUnanswered), Medium: min(5, max(3, totalUnanswered)), Large: all
decisions.reason: Matches test expectations and acceptance criteria ranges
